name: Repair Truck
notes: Camp Cozy's Supply Depot exclusive — Ambulance's vehicle-repair counterpart. Aura is Land-only (filter: "Land", i.e. Vehicle-domain troops), lower magnitude and pricier than Ambulance's Infantry-only heal, reflecting that keeping a vehicle running is a slower/costlier job than patching up infantry. Non-combat (canTarget: []), like Ambulance/Engineer.
